title: rubus × mackayi
intro: Rubus × mackayi, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus, and is a type of bramble that produces edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Rubus × mackayi include its high levels of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × mackayi include teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and nutritional properties.
